ddls:
CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the response */,
  "email_hash" TEXT /* Hashed email to uniquely identify respondents while maintaining anonymity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the respondent to detect potential duplicate responses */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the respondent's browser to gather information about the device and browser used */,
  "survey_version" TEXT /* Version of the survey to track changes over time */,
  "location" TEXT /* Respondent's location (city, country) to understand geographical distribution */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent to analyze demographic data */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the respondent to further analyze demographic data */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the respondent to understand economic factors */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the respondent to analyze professional background */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company the respondent works for to understand organizational context */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Text field for any additional comments or feedback from the respondent */,
  "favorite_language" INTEGER /* Favorite programming language of the respondent */,
  "favorite_movie" INTEGER /* Favorite Monty Python movie of the respondent */,
  "python_experience" INTEGER /* Years of Python experience of the respondent */,
  "scikit_learn_usage" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent has used Scikit-learn */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "terminator_opinion" TEXT /* Opinion on the Terminator franchise (Team Humans or Skynet) */,
  "favorite_game" INTEGER /* Favorite game of the respondent */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Years of post-secondary education of the respondent */,
  "tutorial_success" INTEGER /* Success of the tutorial in the opinion of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_favorite_language FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_language") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_favorite_game FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_game") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_favorite_movie FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_movie") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "language_description" TEXT /* Brief description or details about the programming language */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the popularity of the language in the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "movie_name" TEXT /* Name of the Monty Python movie */,
  "movie_release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "movie_director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "movie_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_release_year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "game_developer" TEXT /* Developer or company that created the game */,
  "game_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)
